g.text: open apps drawer and select 'Electoral Register'
[User selects a status of LA to view (e.g. 'Not uploaded')]
select a status of LA to view (e.g. 'Not uploaded')
call page controller - with status as query param
repeat API calls and render as above
See first API call and render sequence for details
[User searches for a specific LA by name]
Enter LA name in search box and click filter
call page controller - with la code as query param
repeat API calls and render as above
See first API call and render sequence for details
